_meta.purpose: Calibration test set for the output-quality-judge. Each case has a known-correct verdict. Used by calibrate.mjs to detect drift in the deterministic pre-filter (Stage 1) and the LLM judge (Stage 2).

cases.assistant_response: Line 47 of `lib/r3f-compositor/materials/VoronoiStarsMaterial.ts` outputs `fragColor.a = scene.a` but VoronoiStars is emissive — by R08, emissive shaders must use `fragColor.a = max(scene.a, luminance)` to extend coverage past upstream alpha. The exact incident is cited in R08: a prior implementation propagated mask alpha=0 from upstream sim layers, so toggling those layers off made the stars invisible. One-line fix at the fragColor write site.
cases.rationale: Tier A — names file:line, R-rule, mechanism (alpha contract), and the incident. Surgical.

cases.assistant_response: No — per R47 (file-dispatch protocol) the file at `lib/compiler-v5/stages/synthesize.ts` is load-bearing for the compiler. Removing it would break R52 (autosave OCC contract). Keep it and add a comment explaining the dependency.

cases.user_prompt: should we touch the FX-socket dispatch?
cases.assistant_response: Be careful — R22 + R26 form a pair contract. The May-2 incident class (commits `6a2c396e` and `24cdc6ad`) introduced regressions twice when bundled autosave commits stripped the dispatch sites. Both `renderFxChainNodePass` and CASE M in `lib/r3f-compositor/FBOCompositor.tsx` need the `uExtendCoverage` write per emissive primitive. Read R22 before any edit and check `motionTracking.ts` as the canonical example.
cases.rationale: Tier A — names rules by number, names commits, names files and functions, cites incident date and class. Survivable rebuttal from another veteran.

cases.assistant_response: The SDK runtime budget is around 30-35 KB gzipped. This is configured in the esbuild config and enforced through a CI check that fails the build if the bundle exceeds the limit. The tree-shaking strategy ensures unused primitives don't ship.
cases.rationale: Mostly correct shape but the 25KB target per R14 / sdk-runtime-architecture skill is hallucinated as 30-35KB. Tier B because the framing is right but the load-bearing number is wrong. Only catchable by an LLM with knowledge of the actual budget — deterministic pre-filter cannot detect numeric hallucination.
